original: A genetic hybrid of two terran species, the highly adaptable spotted grout was introduced to New Texas's freshwater bodies alongside its colonisation as a huntable source of protein, should the planet's agrarianisation go poorly. It has remained a common sight in New Texan low-lying rivers and lakes ever since.
